title: Community Moderation Update — 2026-04-20
body: We have taken action on several recent abuse reports. Two accounts have been banned for high-severity phishing spam and targeted harassment. One account has received a formal warning for suspicious automation behaviour, and one new member has been reminded of our channel guidelines. Two reports involving trusted community members have been escalated to senior human moderators for independent review. We remain committed to keeping this community safe and welcoming. Thank you to everyone who submitted reports.
